     6→// Get git commit hash for build identification
     7→// Uses execFileSync (not exec) to avoid shell injection - hardcoded args only
     8→function getGitCommitHash(): string {
     9→  try {
    10→    return execFileSync('git', ['rev-parse', '--short=7', 'HEAD'], { encoding: 'utf-8' }).trim()
    11→  } catch {
    12→    return 'unknown'
    13→  }
    14→}
    15→
    16→// Get git commit timestamp for the current HEAD
    17→// Returns ISO 8601 timestamp of when the commit was made
    18→function getGitCommitTimestamp(): string {
    19→  try {
    20→    // %cI = committer date in strict ISO 8601 format
    21→    return execFileSync('git', ['log', '-1', '--format=%cI', 'HEAD'], { encoding: 'utf-8' }).trim()
    22→  } catch {
    23→    return new Date().toISOString() // Fallback to build time
    24→  }
    25→}

    27→// https://vite.dev/config/

# Security headers for Cloudflare Pages
/*
  X-Frame-Options: DENY
  X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
  X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block
  Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
  Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()
  # Cross-Origin Isolation for WebContainer (Phantom Shell)
  # Using 'credentialless' instead of 'require-corp' to allow:
  # - OpenStreetMap tiles (no CORP headers)
  # - Other anonymous cross-origin resources
  # While still enabling SharedArrayBuffer for WebContainers
  Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy: credentialless
  Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin
  # Content Security Policy
  # - default-src 'self': Only allow resources from same origin by default
  # - script-src: Allow self and inline scripts (needed for Vite/React)
  # - style-src: Allow self and inline styles (Tailwind, dynamic styles)
  # - img-src: Allow self, data URIs, blobs, and various image sources
  # - connect-src: Allow self and external APIs (AI providers, widgets)
  # - font-src: Allow self and data URIs
  # - worker-src: Allow self and blobs for web workers
  # - frame-src: Disallow iframes except for specific embeds
  Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://source.unsplash.com https://images.unsplash.com https://*.githubusercontent.com https://www.google.com https://upload.wikimedia.org; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://api.openai.com https://api.anthropic.com https://api.deepseek.com https://api.mistral.ai https://openrouter.ai https://api.x.ai https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://api.groq.com https://api-inference.huggingface.co https://api.together.xyz https://www.boredapi.com https://dev.to https://uselessfacts.jsph.pl https://ipapi.co https://www.producthunt.com https://en.wikipedia.org https://api.coingecko.com https://api.exchangerate-api.com https://hn.algolia.com https://www.reddit.com https://api.github.com https://api.quotable.io https://api.dictionaryapi.dev https://api.open-meteo.com https://air-quality-api.open-meteo.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-src 'none'

# Cache static assets aggressively
/assets/*
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable

# Don't cache HTML
/*.html
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=0, must-revalidate

# Feature Map & Taxonomy

**Last Updated:** November 30, 2025
**Purpose:** Complete feature inventory and categorization
**Audience:** Product, engineering, design

---

## Feature Status Legend

✅ **Shipped** - Live in production
🚧 **In Progress** - Currently being developed
📋 **Planned** - Roadmapped with timeline
💡 **Idea** - Backlog, no timeline
❌ **Not Planned** - Out of scope

---

## 1. Notes & Knowledge Management

### 1.1 Core Notes (P0 - Q1 2026) ✅ SHIPPED November 2025
- ✅ Rich text editor (Lexical) - Shipped Nov 2025
- ✅ Markdown editing mode - Shipped Nov 2025
- ✅ Folder hierarchy (unlimited depth) - Shipped Nov 2025
- ✅ Note creation/deletion with undo - Shipped Nov 2025
- ✅ Full-text search with UI (Cmd+K) - Shipped Nov 2025
- ✅ Auto-save (debounced, IndexedDB) - Shipped Nov 2025
- ❌ Version history - Not implemented
- ✅ Note templates - Shipped Nov 2025

**Parity:** 55% Obsidian, 50% Notion (vs original goal 30%/40%)

### 1.2 Formatting (P1 - Q1-Q2 2026) ✅ SHIPPED November 2025
- ✅ Bold, italic, underline - Shipped Nov 2025 (keyboard shortcuts work)
- ✅ Headings (H1-H3 via slash commands) - Shipped Nov 2025
- ✅ Lists (bullet, numbered via slash commands) - Shipped Nov 2025
- ✅ Code blocks (via slash /code) - Shipped Nov 2025
- ✅ Blockquotes (via slash /quote) - Shipped Nov 2025
- ✅ Tables (3x3 via TablePlugin) - Shipped Nov 2025
- ❌ Horizontal rules - Not implemented
- ❌ Text colors/highlights - Not implemented
- ❌ Strikethrough - Not implemented

**Additional Features:**
- ✅ Slash commands (/heading, /list, /code, /quote) - Shipped Nov 2025
- ✅ Markdown auto-transform (## → heading, * → bullet) - Shipped Nov 2025
- ✅ Auto-linking (URLs become clickable) - Shipped Nov 2025
- ✅ Export to Markdown (.md download) - Shipped Nov 2025
- ✅ Word/character count (live status bar) - Shipped Jan 2026

### 1.3 Media & Embeds (P1-P2 - Q2 2026)
- ❌ Inline images (drag-and-drop) - Phase 5 planned
- ❌ Image resizing
- ❌ File attachments (PDFs, etc.)
- ❌ YouTube embeds
- ❌ Web bookmarks (link previews)
- 💡 Audio recordings
- 💡 Video embeds

### 1.4 Linking & Organization (P1-P2 - Q2 2026)
- ✅ **[[Wiki-style links]] with Autocomplete** - Shipped Nov 29, 2025 (Phase 2.2)
  - Type `[[` to trigger autocomplete dropdown
  - Fuzzy search with relevance scoring (exact match, starts with, contains, fuzzy)
  - Keyboard navigation (↑↓ Enter Esc)
  - Highlight matching characters in results
  - Show folder paths for context
  - Smart boosting (same folder +10, recent notes +0-5)
  - Max 10 results for performance
  - Click or Enter to insert `[[Note Title]]`
  - **Parity with Obsidian/Roam Research baseline linking** ✅
- ❌ Backlinks panel - Planned Phase 2.5
- ✅ **Nested Tags (Hierarchical Organization)** - Shipped Nov 29, 2025 (Phase 2.4)
  - Support `/` separator for hierarchy (e.g., `projects/work/client-a`)
  - Hierarchical tree display in TagPicker with expand/collapse
  - Parent tags show child count
  - Indentation by level (16px per level)
  - Search mode shows flat list, browse mode shows tree
  - Parent tag filtering includes all child notes
  - Backwards compatible - existing flat tags work unchanged
  - Tag normalization (removes invalid slashes)
  - **Parity with Obsidian nested tags** ✅
- ❌ Tag browser - Planned Phase 2.5
- ✅ **Graph View with Focus Mode & Visual Analytics** - Shipped Nov 29-30, 2025 (Phase 2.3)
  - Interactive D3 force-directed graph visualization
  - Search, tag, and folder filters
  - Hide orphan nodes toggle
  - **Focus Mode:** Click node → shows only N-hop neighborhood (1-3 hops)
  - Depth slider for controlling connection distance
  - Focused node highlighted (gold color, larger size, accent border)
  - Single-click to focus, double-click to navigate
  - URL params for shareable focused views (`/graph?focus=note-id`)
  - LocalStorage persistence (focus & visual settings restored on refresh)
  - Smooth D3 transitions and animations
  - **Visual Analytics (P1):** - Shipped Nov 30, 2025
    - **Node sizing by connections:** Nodes scale 10-30px based on link count (hub nodes larger)
    - **Color grouping:** Group by folder or tag with auto-generated color palette
    - Toggle controls for size/color features (default: size ON, color OFF)
    - Color legend shows active groups with node counts
    - Tooltips show connection count, primary tag, and folder
    - **Parity with Obsidian/Logseq graph analytics** ✅
